title: Riches
content:
I have no riches but my thoughts,
Yet these are wealth enough for me;
My thoughts of you are golden coins
Stamped in the mint of memory;

And I must spend them all in song,
For thoughts, as well as gold, must be
Left on the hither side of death
To gain their immortality.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Sara Teasdale delivers a powerful performance in "Riches"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
